disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Purple, flat-topped, polygonal itchy papules with fine white surface lines, flexural (wrists/ankles), new bumps along scratch lines
trigger_question_examples: Are the bumps purple, flat-topped and polygonal with fine white lines on top, and do new ones appear where you scratch?
Where are they — the insides of the wrists/ankles?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, they're purple flat-topped bumps with fine white lacy lines, on my inner wrists and ankles, and new ones pop up where I scratch.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lacy white patches inside the cheeks; not currently painful open ulcers
trigger_question_examples: Any lacy white patches or ulcers inside your mouth?
Is your mouth painful/ulcerated or just white lacy patches?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There are lacy white patches inside my cheeks but they're not painful open ulcers.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No new medications, no widespread blistering, no skin peeling (drug-eruption/SCAR screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any new medicines recently, widespread blistering, or skin peeling?
Is the rash blistering or the skin coming off anywhere?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No new medicines, no widespread blistering and no skin peeling.
